title: Create an ultra-advanced "linkedin-viral-orch" skill focused on viral LinkedIn content
job:
Create an ultra-advanced "linkedin-viral-orch" skill focused on viral LinkedIn content creation and automatic scheduling to Metricool via authentication integration.

The skill should support tone of voice, humanization, structure verification, quality algorithms, expert review workflows, and 30-day post scheduling capability.

Required Structure (skills/linkedin-viral-orch/):
1. SKILL.md — Full documentation with YAML frontmatter describing the skill purpose, usage examples, credentials needed, and activation instructions
2. config-linkedin.md — Skill configuration reference with tone rules, viral patterns, and humanization guidelines
3. Documentation folder (docs/) containing:
   - api-reference.md for LinkedIn GraphQL API and Metricool REST API endpoints
   - tonal-rules.md for voice of brand and humanization guidelines  
   - viral-patterns.md for proven viral content structures, hooks, CTAs
   - metricool-integration.md for OAuth flow and API rates
4. Scripts folder (scripts/) with these files:
   - main.sh — Entry point script that calls other modules dynamically
   - scheduler-calender.sh — 30-day content calendar generation (optimal days/times)
   - viral-pattern-detector.sh — AI-powered pattern analysis engine
   - humanization-engine.sh — Uses de-ai-fy skill to strip robotic patterns from text
   - quality-calculator.sh — Viral score calculator (0-100 scale with structure validation)
   - expert-reviewer.sh — Pre-publish review workflow (grammar, tone, structure checks)
   - content-generator.sh — Multi-format generator (text, image, quote, carousel, threads)
5. Pipelines folder (pipelines/) with workflows:
   - viral-cascade.md — Text + image → multi-format post pipeline
   - calendar-generator.md — 30-day LinkedIn plan generator
   - metricool-sync-automation.md — Auto-sync to Metricool platform schedule
6. Templates folder (templates/) with:
   - quote-post.md, carousel-template.md, thread-post.md, story-post.md examples
7. Resources folder with captions and viral headline templates

The skill should support the following core operations via CLI commands:
- `linkedin post` — Generate single post with quality validation
- `linkedin batch --count 50` — Batch process multiple posts
- `linkedin calendar --days 30` — Generate content calendar
- `linkedin review` — Expert pre-publish review workflow
- `linkedin metricool sync` — Synchronize to Metricool API

Credentials Needed (user should set these up via npx thepopebot set-agent-llm-secret):
- METRICOOL_USER_TOKEN — OAuth token for Metricool integration
- METRICOOL_TOKEN_ID — User ID and blog/project ID for scheduling
- LINKEDIN_BEARER_API — LinkedIn Bearer/GraphQL access token
- BRVESE_API_KEY (optional) — For AI content research

Activation:
- Create symlink `ln -s ../linkedin-viral-orch skills/active/linkedin-viral-orch` after building all files

This skill will enable: viral text/image/article/quote/carousel generation, humanization using de-ai-fy, quality algorithms with viral score calculations, and automatic scheduling to Metricool via authentication flow for 30-day campaigns.
